title: Moonbetween
description: A mod to add accessories to The Betweenlands mod
body:
The necessary mods required are not in Modrinth，
It is in :[The Betweenlands](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/angry-pixel-the-betweenlands-mod)
-

This mod adds a large number of accessories to TheBetweenlands, all of which can be obtained in various cross dimensional chests

Just like this:

![Some items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978f9d9022fb158e0025e5b125e0eabd32217cdb.webp)

And：

![A item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea8d8eece741cd42cdce6151abe96cd7551955a.webp)

Even if you obtain a large number of duplicate items, you can grind them into loot fragments using the grinder in TheBetweenlands：

![like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e41e17e09d85a5f52a3711df71c2cceeee44f34.webp)
